artPrompt: A sunlit patchwork of raised garden beds stretches across a fenced town green, leafy tomato vines tangling with neat rows of seedlings and one wildly overgrown mystery plot, folding tables and a leaning trellis catching golden afternoon light. No central figure, only the cozy civic plots. Wide landscape composition, leafy green and warm ivory washes bleeding into golden glow. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Community Garden Plot
text:
Community Garden Plot enters the battlefield tapped unless you control a Voter or Citizen.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
flavorText: Plot 14 is tomatoes. Plot 15 is petitions. Plot 16 is whatever Dale planted and won't admit to.
